findings.evidence: Standalone interpretive snap-back paragraphs recur after major beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:43, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:55, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:67, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:95, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:213, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:395, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:507.
findings.problem: The chapter repeatedly resolves already vivid scenes with isolated thesis-like commentary paragraphs. That construction appears well over twice and starts flattening the prose by explaining beats the physical writing has already earned, especially around the authorization scene, Tomas confrontation, casualty fieldwork, and eel aftermath.
findings.rewrite_direction: Trim or vary the epigrammatic commentary anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:43, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:55, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:67, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:95, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:213, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:395, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:507. Keep the scene-level meaning on the page through gesture, sensory residue, or dialogue pressure instead of a separate summative sentence after each beat.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised passages anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:43, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:55, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:67, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:95, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:213, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:395, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_15.md:507 contain no more than one standalone thesis-style commentary paragraph across those beats, with the others replaced by observable action, bodily response, or dialogue that makes the point legible without narrator overstatement; fail if multiple beats still end in isolated moral or interpretive snap-backs.

summary: Chapter 15 cleanly lands the required disaster spine: the county authorizes spraying despite wildlife objections, Tomas participates under explicit economic coercion, the rookery casualty scene is rendered with unsanitized specificity, and the eel returns as contamination rather than wonder alone. Continuity, past-tense close-third control, and character-specific dialogue all hold. The chapter misses a full prose pass because it leans too often on standalone thesis sentences that summarize scenes after the embodied writing has already made their meaning clear.
